commands.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const syn=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('briefing.synthesis.json','utf8')); const rev=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('synthesis-review.json','utf8')); const tr=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('command-trace.json','utf8')); if(syn.units.length!==2) throw new Error('expected two units'); if(!syn.scope.request.includes('local self-verification')) throw new Error('missing local self-verification'); if(!syn.secondary_items?.length) throw new Error('missing secondary_items'); if(rev.verdict!=='ready'||rev.ready_for_artifact!==true||rev.required_edits.length!==0) throw new Error('review contract mismatch'); if(tr.schema_version!=='1'||!tr.commands[0].command.includes('helper.mjs version')||!tr.commands.some(c=>c.command.includes('synthesis validate'))) throw new Error('trace contract mismatch'); console.log('local contract check passed');"
